name: Mock Hollandaise Sauce (Low Cholesterol)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan with wire whisk, beat all ingredients until smooth.
2. Stirring constantly, cook over medium-low heat until thick (do not boil).
3. Serve over vegetables or fish.
4. Makes 1 1/2 cups
5. Contains 5 mg cholesterol per tablespoon.
